summary.intent: Deprecate the @release-artists Slack handle across all workspace repos, replacing it with @automated-tooling-triage and changing generic team references to 'ART team'.
summary.outcome: Successfully created branches, made edits, committed, and raised 4 GitHub PRs across art-tools (11 files), aos-cd-jobs (5 files), art-docs (5 files), and art-dashboard-ui (2 files). One GitLab MR for art-ai-helpers needs manual creation due to expired token.

repo: Workspace contains 5 affected repos with different default branches: art-tools and art-ai-helpers use main, aos-cd-jobs/art-docs/art-dashboard-ui use master
Most repos use 'prod' remote pointing to openshift-eng GitHub org, except art-ai-helpers which uses GitLab at gitlab.cee.redhat.com (hybrid-platforms/art)
art-tools CLAUDE.md references a 'dev' remote that doesn't actually exist in the repo setup
art-bot repo exists at /Users/asdas/JetBrains/PycharmProjects/art-bot but contains no references to release-artist

code.finding: RELEASE_ARTIST_HANDLE constant definition was renamed to ART_TRIAGE_HANDLE with value changed from 'release-artists' to 'automated-tooling-triage'
Multiple @release-artists references in GitHub PR text templates at lines 969, 981, 993, 1591, 1622

workflow: Slack handle references (with @) get replaced with @automated-tooling-triage, generic team references without @ become 'ART team'
Pre-commit hooks may require sandbox permissions for certain repos
PR titles can be bulk-updated after creation using 'gh pr edit'
GitLab enterprise instances may need manual MR creation if MCP token expires and glab CLI isn't authenticated

friction: Initial execution blocked by Plan mode, required user to switch to Agent mode
art-tools commit failed first attempt due to pre-commit hook sandbox issue, required retry with proper permissions
GitLab MCP token expired for gitlab.cee.redhat.com
glab CLI not authenticated for enterprise GitLab instance, forcing manual MR creation
open_items: art-ai-helpers GitLab MR needs manual creation at https://gitlab.cee.redhat.com/asdas1/art-ai-helpers/-/merge_requests/new with title 'Deprecate @release-artists handle' targeting hybrid-platforms/art/art-ai-helpers main branch
Untracked file art-tools/create_f2f_tickets.sh was identified with occurrences but skipped from changes
